title: Lecture 7 - Pre-initiation complex order
desc: Build the usual simplified order for eukaryotic pre-initiation complex assembly.
learningObjective: Recall the simplified sequence of pre-initiation complex assembly.
canonicalAnswer: TFIID -> TFIIB -> Pol II/TFIIF -> TFIIE -> TFIIH

title: Lecture 14 - Pre-mRNA processing flow
desc: Order these major pre-mRNA processing events in the usual study-friendly sequence.
learningObjective: Recall the core sequence of pre-mRNA processing events.
